ingredients.text: sweet chilli and sour cream flavour seasoning

ingredients_text: 63% potatoes, 30% high oleic sunflower oil, 7% sweet chilli and sour cream flavour seasoning (dried whey (milk), salt, sugar, dried sour cream (milk), ground spices (paprika, cayenne pepper), dried onion, natural flavouring, dried yeast extract, acid: citric acid, chilli blend [chilli, cumin, oregano, salt, garlic], dried red bell pepper, dried garlic, colour: paprika extract, rosemary extract),
product_name: Deluxe Sweet Chilli & Sour Cream Hand cooked Potato Crisps
